channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Frandroid part à Macao chercher les robots qui veulent envahir nos vies
item.description: Frandroid sera à Beyond Expo 2026, du 27 au 30 mai à Macao. Avec un angle clair : aller voir de près l'industrie des robots en Chine qui grossit à la vitesse de l'éclair.

item.title: De’Longhi's new Pinguino air conditioner will keep you cool in any room, and it's launched just in time for the UK's early summer heat
item.description: De’Longhi has unveiled a new model in its range of Pinguino portable air conditioners with 13,300 BTU output and more efficient energy use

item.title: AMD lance une station de travail IA : 4000 dollars pour un monstre déjà dépassé ?
item.description: AMD a dévoilé une nouvelle station de travail IA de son cru. Destinée aux développeurs et aux créateurs de contenus, cette petite machine embarque 128 Go de RAM mais s'en tient à un processeur désormais ancien, le tout... pour la coquette somme de 4 000 dollars.

item.title: Nvidia est en passe de dépasser Intel et AMD sur le marché des processeurs
item.description: Grâce à des résultats financiers dépassant encore les attentes, Nvidia compte bien dépasser Intel et AMD dans un secteur dans lequel on les connaît pourtant moins : celui des processeurs.

item.title: Cyberattaque contre GitHub : des milliers de données privées ont été compromises
item.description: GitHub a été la cible d'une cyberattaque sophistiquée menée par le gang TeamPCP. En glissant une extension corrompue dans la boutique officielle de Visual Studio Code pendant seulement 18 minutes, les pirates ont réussi à voler une montagne de données confidentielles.

item.title: Tesla brings Full Self-Driving to China
item.description: Tesla says China is now one of the countries where Full Self-Driving is available after years of regulatory delays.

item.title: 11 Best Meal Delivery Services, Tested by an Ex-Restaurant Critic
item.description: Here are the best meal kits in 2026, including Martha Stewart’s delivery box, a GLP-1–supportive plan, and a budget-friendly option.

item.title: Best Duffel Bags: Eastpak, Patagonia, Baboon to the Moon (2026)
item.description: Need to schlep some stuff? These field-tested duffels can handle your baggage.

item.title: I never thought I'd use an action camera for street photography — then SmallRig changed my mind
item.description: SmallRig's cage won't make your action cam a Leica — but it might just make you want to use it for street photography.

item.title: Oppo Reno 16 et Reno 16 Pro : batterie de 7 000 mAh et caméra 200 Mpx au menu
item.description: Voici tout ce qu'il faut attendre des Oppo Reno 16 dont la présentation est prévue le 25 mai. Reste une grande inconnue dans l'équation : l'Europe.

item.title: « Google Search, c’est fini » : Google sort de son silence face aux accusations d’avoir tué son moteur de recherche
item.description: Vingt-quatre heures après une keynote qui a fait grincer des dents tout le web, Google sort sur X pour défendre son moteur de recherche. Une réponse soigneusement formulée, qui en dit long sur ce que la firme craint vraiment.

item.title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
item.description: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

item.title: I loved a lot of things about the Dell XPS 14 (2026), but it won't make me ditch my MacBook Pro... yet
item.description: A year after killing off its XPS line, Dell has reversed course and released the new Dell XPS 14. Could this be the device that makes Windows 11 laptops great again?

item.title: 'AI is a great tool, but it's a tool': Linus Torvalds lays out his complex 'love-hate relationship with AI'
item.description: Torvalds says he doesn't always get on with AI, but believes there will always be work for programmers.

item.title: Endurante et étanche, l’une des meilleures enceintes pas chères est à prix cassé sur Amazon
item.description: L'enceinte Bluetooth Soundcore 3 d'Anker résiste à l'eau, offre une durée d'écoute de 20 heures et ne dépasse pas les 42 euros sur Amazon, alors que le site officiel la propose à 69,99 euros.

item.title: Meta has reportedly laid off 8,000 employees
item.description: Meta lays off around 10 percent of its total staff as it pivots toward AI.

item.title: 5 Best Android Tablets in 2026: OnePlus, Lenovo, and Pixel Compared
item.description: Whether you need a portable, around-the-house entertainment center or a full-on laptop replacement, these are the best Android tablets.

item.title: ‘Nothing short of nightmarish’: Xiaomi's Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G has some of the worst software I’ve ever used — but its display, cameras, and battery life are undeniably impressive
item.description: Stir together a decent display, bountiful battery life, commendable cameras, and shockingly bad software, and you’ll get the Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro — should you buy it?

item.title: The new Samsung 85-Inch Neo QLED QN70H TV is down to its best-ever price at Amazon — save $300
item.description: As of May 21, the Samsung 85-Inch Neo QLED QN70H smart TV has dropped to its lowest price so far at Amazon of $1,997.99. This is 13% off its list price of $2,297.99.

item.title: BTS Arirang World Tour: How to watch it live in cinemas
item.description: You can still get tickets to watch the 'BTS World Tour Arirang: Live Viewing' on June 13 live from Busan.

item.title: It's not too late to get a portable air conditioner before the UK heatwave hits, and they don't cost a fortune — I bought one three years ago, and I'm so grateful to past me
item.description: Here's what you should know before you buy one, based on my experience

item.title: PS Plus : Sony augmente le prix de toutes les offres, à une exception près
item.description: PlayStation a augmenté les tarifs de toutes les offres du PS Plus, à une exception près. Les hausses varient de 1 à 5 € pour les abonnements trimestriels et mensuels des formules Essential, Extra et Premium.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Avatar The Last Airbender Beginner Box hits record-low price on Amazon — now under $20
item.description: Use Amazon’s 20% coupon to get the MTG Avatar The Last Airbender Beginner Box for $19.52 while the deal lasts.

item.title: Is there a better way to watch the World Cup in style than this enormous 98-inch QLED TV? Better still, it's now a massive £1,100 off
item.description: AO has one of the biggest discounts on one of the biggest TVs I've ever seen, with over £1,000 off the enormous Hisense E7Q 98-inch QLED TV — that's one way to watch the World Cup in style.

item.title: The era of ‘good enough’ AI has arrived
item.description: As frontier AI models get pricier, cheaper and locally hosted alternatives are becoming powerful enough for most users. The release of Google’s latest AI models this week at Google I/O was yet another example of the direction of travel for the generative AI revolution. Facing a user base that is increasingly burning more tokens under basic subscriptions or API access, AI companies are starting to hike prices and throttle usage....

item.title: 3 Best Smart Ring Brands: Oura, RingConn, and Samsung (2026)
item.description: A svelte smart ring can track important activity, sleep, and health metrics. Plus—unlike most smartwatches—it doesn’t need to be charged every day.

item.title: Beauty booking startup Fresha hits $1 billion valuation with KKR backing
item.description: Beauty and wellness booking marketplace Fresha says it has raised $80 million investment from KKR’s Next Generation Technology Growth fund, KKR's growth equity arm.

item.title: Whoops! Trump Mobile seems to be leaking customer information — and order numbers might be far lower than previously estimated
item.description: It seems the Trump Mobile site isn't particularly secure, which is bad news for customers.

item.title: How to bypass social media blocks and increased surveillance in 2026
item.description: Hitting a firewall on your travels? From stealth VPNs to encrypted eSIMs, here is your definitive 2026 guide to bypassing social media blocks and escaping government surveillance safely abroad.

item.title: Jeff Bezos makes a $34 million bet to replace cotton and polyester
item.description: The Bezos Earth Fund is backing lab-grown fibers and biodegradable textiles, but not without problems. Jeff Bezos is betting that the future of fashion won’t be made from cotton or polyester but, instead, from lab-grown fibers.

item.title: This beautiful, biophilic phone case is on a mission to reduce your screen time
item.description: Want to keep your terrarium alive? You’ll have to put your screen down. It’s alive.

item.title: AI could suck out life from your IT teams and leave them as tech zombies
item.description: AI should automate routine tasks like a calculator, but over-reliance risks eroding critical human judgment.

item.title: Meta, Snap and Roblox commit to tougher anti-grooming measures in UK
item.description: Ofcom has urged social networks to implement anti-grooming measures.

item.title: Zuckerberg promises he does not 'expect ​other company-wide layoffs this year' after slashing thousands of Meta jobs
item.description: After Meta lays off thousands of workers, Zuckerberg says that's all - for now.

item.title: Why our national sovereignty depends on cyber resilience
item.description: Shared cyber resiliency is an imperative for our wider national sovereignty and security.

item.title: The Lumix L10 looks great, but I can't help thinking this underrated camera is a fantastic alternative — and it's half the price
item.description: The Lumix L10 is impressive, but it still comes with a significant outlay, so here's the camera I'd recommend as a great budget alternative.

item.title: ‘More intuitive than ever’ — iOS 27’s new AI voice controls could finally make Siri feel smart
item.description: Recent accessibility upgrades might hint at agentic AI powers coming to Siri in iOS 27.

item.title: Pizzas froides, retards de livraison : comment l’IA de Pizza Hut aurait fait perdre 100 millions de dollars à l’entreprise
item.description: L'intelligence artificielle devait révolutionner la livraison de pizzas chez Pizza Hut, mais elle aurait tourné au fiasco industriel à 100 millions de dollars.

item.title: Best Dyson Vacuums (2026): V15 Detect, Gen5Detect, PencilVac
item.description: Feeling the pull of a new clean machine? We’ll help you make sense of Dyson’s whirlwind vacuum lineup.

item.title: ‘Margo’s Got Money Troubles’ Won TV’s OnlyFans Wars
item.description: Unlike Euphoria, the Apple TV show wants to humanize the experience of sex workers rather than catastrophize the extremes of the profession.

item.title: Google’s Workspace icons just got the ‘AI gradient’ treatment
item.description: Gradients are the new blanding. Google is quietly rolling out a redesign of the logos for its Workspace apps, including Gmail, Google Docs, and Google Drive. They now look like they’ve been run through a watercolor filter.

item.title: Pepper just got a DTC glow-up
item.description: Milly’s chunky hand-drawn logo and coordinated, color-on-color pepper mills give a dash of design intentionality and add some spice to the category. When’s the last time you thought about pepper?

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Ascended Heroes Mega Feraligatr ex Box is under $70 at Amazon — act fast to save over $10
item.description: Amazon has the Ascended Heroes Mega Feraligatr ex Box back under $70 with four booster packs and two promo cards.

item.title: The building blocks to construct a cyber-first culture
item.description: How to lay the foundations for a cyber-first mindset from the ground up.

item.title: Xpeng lance un immense SUV électrique qui donne raison à Elon Musk sur un équipement décrié
item.description: Xpeng déroule son plan produit et ajoute un immense SUV à sa gamme : le GX. Disponible en version 100 % électrique et à prolongateur d'autonomie, il sera utilisé pour l'activité de taxi autonome de la marque, mais confirme que Xpeng n'est plus du tout intéressé par le LiDAR, confirmant la vision d'Elon Musk.

item.title: This smart temperature probe will take all the guesswork out of BBQing — it tells you exactly how long to cook and rest your meat for, for perfectly juicy, charred and tender results
item.description: Sick of slaving over a BBQ for hours, only to end up with tough or under-cooked meat? You need a Meater

item.title: Les fleurons LG OLED G6 et C6 sont enfin disponibles : où les acheter au meilleur prix ?
item.description: Ils incarnent la nouvelle vitrine technologique de LG et ils sont enfin disponibles à l’achat ! Les nouveaux téléviseurs OLED des gammes G6 et C6 débarquent sur le marché. Après les avoir testés de fond en comble (et avoir collé un joli 9/10 au G6), voici où les dénicher au meilleur prix.

item.title: Stephen Colbert rips into the Trump phone
item.description: The Trump Mobile T1 smartphone is set to ship to customers (probably?), following a legion of delays.

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel gives a moving farewell to Stephen Colbert
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel paid a moving tribute to Stephen Colbert during his show on Wednesday.

item.title: Looking for a cheap De'Longhi coffee maker? I'm a trained barista, and these are the 3 best deals I recommend right now
item.description: Amazon has slashed the price of De'Longhi espresso machines for Memorial Day, and these three are my top picks.
